title: Beehiiv vs HubSpot (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Beehiiv vs HubSpot: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Beehiiv and HubSpot comes down to your specific use case. Beehiiv is built for newsletter publishers and media operators, while HubSpot targets businesses that want email and CRM in one platform.

comparison_table.tool_b: Businesses That Want Email And Crm In One Platform

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on newsletter publishers and media operators
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on businesses that want email and CRM in one platform

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Beehiiv wins for newsletter publishers and media operators, while HubSpot is stronger for businesses that want email and CRM in one platform.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or HubSpot?
faq.a: HubSpot starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from HubSpot to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
